svg.title: Global Energy Platform — complete architecture and technology flow
svg.desc: Data flows from three sources (CSV, FastAPI, PostgreSQL) through PySpark ingestion jobs orchestrated by run_ingestion.py into S3 Bronze, then Silver and Gold layers, with Apache Airflow scheduling.

g.text: orchestrator — wires all source runners · prints summary · sys.exit(1) on any failure

svg.text: PostgreSQL tracking (timeseries only): ingestion_watermark · ingestion_log · psycopg2
AWS S3 · Parquet · Snappy · 8 tables · ~21.8M rows · aws-java-sdk-bundle
csv/db → partitioned by ingestion_date= · api timeseries → partitioned by year_month= + site_id=
s3://gep-datalake-dev/silver/ · PySpark · type casting · deduplication · null handling · derived columns
Apache Airflow · DAG scheduling · Bronze → Silver → Gold
